title: Sebuah Pola di Jembatan Penyeberangan
theme: Menjelajahi bagaimana sebuah pengamatan kecil dan rasa ingin tahu yang ringan dapat membuka pintu bagi sebuah koneksi tak terduga antara dua orang asing di tengah hiruk pikuk kota.

cover.prompt: Early morning scene in Jakarta, focusing on an aged metal pedestrian overpass with a faded, corrugated roof. The bridge stretches across a busy street, with the distant urban architecture of Thamrin visible through a soft morning glow. Gentle sunlight bathes the scene, highlighting the structure and creating a hopeful atmosphere. Subtle silhouettes of people are visible, conveying the daily commute without specific features, ascending towards the city. The composition uses the rule of thirds, emphasizing the bridge's path.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: The story follows a graphic designer who observes a man's consistent pattern of tote bag colors and book genres on a pedestrian overpass in Jakarta. Her initial curiosity leads to a subtle 'investigation' and eventually a non-verbal interaction that sparks a unique connection in the busy city.
